scripts.deploy:preview: pnpm env:check && set -a && . ./.env && set +a && vercel deploy . -y
scripts.lint: howells-check --config=oxlint.config.ts src scripts templates disciplines next-env.d.ts next.config.mjs postcss.config.mjs source.config.ts tsconfig.json package.json oxlint.config.ts oxfmt.config.ts
scripts.lint:fix: howells-fix --config=oxlint.config.ts src scripts templates disciplines next-env.d.ts next.config.mjs postcss.config.mjs source.config.ts tsconfig.json package.json oxlint.config.ts oxfmt.config.ts
scripts.format: howells-oxfmt --write src scripts templates disciplines docs public next-env.d.ts next.config.mjs postcss.config.mjs source.config.ts tsconfig.json package.json oxlint.config.ts oxfmt.config.ts README.md AGENTS.md CHANGELOG.md CLAUDE.md INSTALL.md
